aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite or recommend this business due to a lack of structured data and authoritative content, despite decent foundational SEO.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup with relevant properties.
Create a dedicated FAQ page with structured FAQPage schema.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is not optimized or even visible, severely limiting local search visibility.
critical_issues: Google Business Profile is not found.
Missing photos, posts, and Q&A engagement on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Expand NAP citations to additional local directories for increased visibility.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for maintenance guides

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from understanding and recommending the business.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries and 'best HVAC near me' searches.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness schema to provide AI with essential business information.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcase industry expertise through detailed how-to guides and case studies with HowTo schema.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for ChatGPT and Google AI.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their Google Business Profile is not found, and no schema markup is present, making them invisible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, GBP optimization, and conversational content to make their business stand out to AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share—act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Growth for AllStar Heating and Cooling
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found significant opportunities to boost your visibility with AI assistants like ChatGPT and Google AI.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven growth.
